Charlotte’s Web (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $82,985,708Details
International Box Office $61,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $143,985,708
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $86,757,853
Total $86,757,853
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,457,353 (13.8% of total gross)
Legs:7.11 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$82,500,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,566 opening theaters/3,745 max. theaters, 6.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $140,802,635

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 15th, 2006 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures, released as Charlotte's Web
International Releases: January 21st, 2021 (Limited), released as Charlotte's Web (Australia)
Video Release: April 3rd, 2007 by Paramount Home Video, released as Charlotte's Web
MPA Rating: G
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Nickelodeon Films, Walden Media, Paramount Pictures, Kerner Entertainment Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
